idx_users_email.name: idx_users_email
idx_users_email.where: "users"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."deleted_at" IS NULL

idx_users_phone.name: idx_users_phone
idx_users_phone.where: "users"."phone" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."deleted_at" IS NULL

idx_products_tenant_slug.name: idx_products_tenant_slug
idx_products_tenant_slug.where: "products"."slug" IS NOT NULL AND "products"."deleted_at" IS NULL

idx_customers_email.name: idx_customers_email
idx_customers_email.where: "customers"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "customers"."deleted_at" IS NULL

idx_customers_phone.name: idx_customers_phone
idx_customers_phone.where: "customers"."phone" IS NOT NULL AND "customers"."deleted_at" IS NULL
